titleStmt.title: SII 16.99: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 99. (A.R. No. 744 of 1922.) PĀPINĀYAKANAHAḶḶI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the maṇḍapa of the Aṅkāḷamma temple.
This is dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Śrāvaṇa ba. 30, Thursday, corresponding to 1532 A.D., August 1, °14.

Seems to refer to a sale deed pertaining to a land at Niḍugula alias Apināyakanapuram, a sarvamānya-agrahāra for the amṛitapaḍi services of the goddess Ārugoṇḍala Aṅkāḷamma by the sons of Talāri Timmi-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayā Aṁbudaya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1454
Agunanēṭi naṁdana saṁvatsara śrā
vaṇa ba 30 gu śrīmatu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
Accyutadēvamahārāyalu pṛtivirājya
muṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu niḍugulānaku pratinā
mamaina Apināyakanapuraṁ sarvamānya Agrahā
ramaṁḍu talāri tiṁmināIni koḍukulu tamyaEji
ṁvuniki tamululu baira[E] ja 4 Ārugoṁḍa naga
raṁkaṁḍi gōtra nariseṭi koḍku peyaṁna ta
la Okaḍu yī ḍina Ārugoṁḍa Aṁkāladēva
laku Amṛtapaḷaku Iccina krayapatraṁ
niḍugulānana talārikaṁ [nā pālu na 1 varimaḍi]
stalaṁ catussīma guḍirāmani stalaṁ sahā kraya
micci nēmu nī cēta pucukonna krayamūlyaṁ sā
kalyaṁ gānu cellēga 1 nnu
cē[I]ṁcukoni[mā I] śrī patradayādira gati
maṁta Anumataṁganu trivacakaṁganu mi putrapau
tra paraṁparyaṁgānu ĀcaṁdrārkastaIgānu Aṁkalama Amṛ
tapaḷaku krayamicina krayapatra
dēvarastalāpanuṁḍi stitini I vinvaNmaĀjanala
valaṁbaṭlu narabaṭlu vīravaviṁganna ma
la virapa mādapa giribaṭlu koṁḍibaṭlu vardarāju
raṁjaraṁju Elapa vīrala nata niḍugala stalakara
naṁ nīlapaṁgari basvapa vēsina patraṁ sakṣu
lu Aruvaikulakāṁpulu gauni liṁgana pemana .
Digital edition of SII 16.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
